sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_struct (id INT, data STRUCT<name VARCHAR, age INT>);
INSERT INTO test_struct VALUES (1, struct_pack(name := 'Alice', age := 30));
UPDATE test_struct SET data = struct_pack(name := 'Bob', age := 25) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, data.name, data.age FROM test_struct;
CREATE TABLE nested_struct (info STRUCT<details STRUCT<name VARCHAR, age INT>>);
